# clawvisor_model_policy (Resource)

The singleton model allow/deny policy for the instance (OSS) or org (Cloud). Import with id `model_policy`. Requires the `local_governance` capability (spec 06a) on OSS.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# The singleton model allow/deny policy. Models are provider-qualified ids.
# Requires the local_governance capability (spec 06a) on OSS.
resource "clawvisor_model_policy" "default" {
  mode = "allow"
  models = [
    "anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet",
    "anthropic/claude-3-5-haiku",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mode` (String) `allow` (only listed models permitted) or `deny` (listed models blocked).
- `models` (List of String) Provider-qualified model ids, e.g. `anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Always `model_policy` (singleton).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Singleton: the import id is always "model_policy".
terraform import clawvisor_model_policy.default model_policy
```
